assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 20-22 show: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 25 explicitly states: 'We check out TC-9005 (the Target Branch from the task description), NOT main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 31 shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column" --body "..."'. Line 34 states: 'The PR targets --base TC-9005, NOT --base main, because the Target Branch is TC-9005.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 22 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' creating the task branch. Line 25 explicitly clarifies: 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (this task's Jira issue ID), not TC-9005.' Line 30 shows 'git push -u origin TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 70-78 in the 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' section reference all three files: (1) 'Inspect migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' (line 70), (2) 'Inspect entity/src/advisory.rs' (line 72), (3) 'Inspect migration/src/lib.rs' (line 74). file-1-description.md lines 9-18 also detail inspecting m0001_initial/mod.rs and entity/src/advisory.rs. file-2-description.md lines 9-14 detail inspecting lib.rs.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 52 states: "With the trailer: `--trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code'`"

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 39-50 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat', scope 'migration', and description). Line 49 shows 'Implements TC-9205' in the footer.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8 states: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch, linked via "is incorporated by TC-9005")'. Lines 12-13 explicitly discuss Target Branch analysis: 'The task description contains a Target Branch section specifying TC-9005. This is a feature branch (not main), indicating that TC-9205 is part of a larger feature being developed on the TC-9005 feature branch.'
